defaultGuidance.responsibility: General academic grievances, attendance regularization, and grade-related routing
defaultGuidance.studentAction: Carry supporting documents such as mark sheets, attendance records, and course details when visiting the office.
defaultGuidance.escalationNote: If the issue is not resolved within two working days, escalate through the Head of Department.

guidance.responsibility: Exam timetable, seating, and hall-ticket coordination
guidance.studentAction: Mention subject code, semester, and exam date while reporting the issue.

guidance.responsibility: Grade correction and marks verification
guidance.studentAction: Bring answer-script reference details or evaluation evidence if available.

guidance.responsibility: Attendance shortage review and regularization
guidance.studentAction: Carry approved leave letters or medical certificates for verification.

defaultGuidance.responsibility: Certificates, ID cards, and administrative process support
defaultGuidance.studentAction: Keep enrollment number and identity proof available during the visit.

guidance.responsibility: Bonafide, transcripts, and identity card requests
guidance.studentAction: Mention the certificate type and urgency while following up.

guidance.responsibility: Section changes and branch transfer workflow
guidance.studentAction: Carry current section details and any prior approval note.

defaultGuidance.responsibility: Digital access, network issues, and lab systems
defaultGuidance.studentAction: Carry screenshots, device details, and error messages where possible.

guidance.responsibility: Campus Wi-Fi, VPN, and network access issues
guidance.studentAction: Share hostel/academic block location and device MAC address if available.

guidance.responsibility: LMS access and college email account issues
guidance.studentAction: Mention platform, registered email, and exact login error.

guidance.responsibility: Lab desktops, licensed software, and workstation issues
guidance.studentAction: Mention lab number, machine identifier, and the affected software.

defaultGuidance.responsibility: Room allocation, facilities, and hostel services
defaultGuidance.studentAction: Carry hostel room details and resident ID while following up.

guidance.responsibility: Room allotment and room-change requests
guidance.studentAction: Mention current room number, requested change, and reason.

guidance.responsibility: Electrical, plumbing, and cleanliness issues in hostels
guidance.studentAction: Share hostel block, room number, and whether the issue is urgent or safety-related.

guidance.responsibility: Food quality, billing, and mess operations
guidance.studentAction: Mention meal shift, date, and billing reference where applicable.

defaultGuidance.responsibility: Fee issues, scholarships, refunds, and financial clearances
defaultGuidance.studentAction: Keep payment receipts, scholarship ID, and bank details ready for verification.

guidance.responsibility: Payment failures, challan mismatches, and late-fee review
guidance.studentAction: Share transaction ID, payment date, and amount while following up.

guidance.responsibility: Scholarship eligibility, document verification, and disbursement delays
guidance.studentAction: Carry scholarship application number, bank details, and document acknowledgements.

guidance.responsibility: Refund timelines, approval status, and payment release
guidance.studentAction: Mention refund request date, amount, and approval reference.

defaultGuidance.responsibility: Code of conduct concerns and general campus safety routing
defaultGuidance.studentAction: Report urgent safety risks immediately to campus security before waiting for normal processing.
defaultGuidance.escalationNote: For immediate danger or theft in progress, contact campus security and emergency response first.

guidance.responsibility: Misconduct reporting and conduct review intake
guidance.studentAction: Provide incident date, location, and any supporting evidence or witness details.

guidance.responsibility: Campus theft, security incidents, and urgent safety escalation
guidance.studentAction: If the incident is active or urgent, report it immediately to the security control room and then keep the grievance updated.

defaultGuidance.responsibility: Exam schedule, hall tickets, revaluation, and exam administration
defaultGuidance.studentAction: Keep roll number, subject code, and semester details ready.

guidance.responsibility: Revaluation and recounting process guidance
guidance.studentAction: Mention exam, subject code, and original result publication date.

guidance.responsibility: Timetable clashes and scheduling errors
guidance.studentAction: Share the conflicting exam dates, subject names, and timetable copy if available.

guidance.responsibility: Hall-ticket generation and correction issues
guidance.studentAction: Carry a printout or screenshot of the hall-ticket issue during follow-up.

defaultGuidance.responsibility: Confidential PoSH and harassment complaint intake
defaultGuidance.studentAction: Use confidential reporting channels and avoid sharing the complaint details in public spaces.
defaultGuidance.escalationNote: For immediate safety risks, contact emergency support and then the ICC confidential desk.

guidance.responsibility: Confidential sexual-harassment complaint intake and routing
guidance.studentAction: Use confidential channels and request a private appointment if needed.

guidance.responsibility: Anti-ragging complaint intake and protected routing
guidance.studentAction: Share only the minimum required facts in digital channels and request confidential follow-up.
